name: bit of chill tuesday
description:
It's me again, international best selling author quan mills-

anyways

wanted to ask something, are my idea's getting a little bland maybe? like i dont really know what kind scenarios i can make to be idk "original" or maybe not milk past bots (haven't even been doing that but i love being skeptical of myself idk)

Update: i mane the bot, contain your horniness: Zari

so in the discord, i got two characters wanting to be done
Akina-chan (an Oc)

Yukari Yakumo
(both from buckethead ero)

thing is idk what i wanna do with em... so do you guys have any suggestions

busy on cooldown cause i got classes to do and a pot i gotta fire in the kiln this week so i can paint it later

love you guys 🩵

(psst, also yall are welcome to recommend anything else, artist, characters, whatever, cause lowkey adhd beating my ass bro😭)

OH YEAH, make sure you guys put on layes, idk where yall at but it is COLD cold these days bruh, leather jacket go craaaaaazy.
creator: PanchumBlitz
